'''''Star Wars'' 3''' is the third issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Republic]]'' series of comics. It was published on [[February 17]], [[1999]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]].

==Publisher's summary==
''As Ki-Adi-Mundi gets closer to the truth of who is seeking to destabilize his homeworld, and why, he comes closer and closer to his own doom, and only the dimly remembered teachings of his diminutive Jedi Master can save him!''

==Plot summary==
Shortly after the death of the Swoop-gang leader, [[Skeel (Cerean)|Skeel]], [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]] decides it is time to move their hiding place. It turns out to be none-too-soon, as Ki-Adi-Mundi is hot on his trail. Just as he is attacked by Mon's [[Battle droid/Legends|merc droid]], a messenger from the Elders arrives with his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. While barely escaping with his life, the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] authorizes to pursue his charges off-world.
